content.en:
The starting price of the Super Dimensional Xuantian Dao Fruit is 50 billion Galanbao Coins.

To be honest, it would never be possible for a normal peak realm god to afford it, but this kind of treasure was not for ordinary peak realm gods, but for the heirs of the transcendent realm.

Every extradimensional realm wants to cultivate their own heirs to the extradimensional realm, and the superdimensional Xuantian Dao Fruit can do it.

It can be said that such a super-dimensional Xuantian Dao fruit is enough to make the extra-dimensional realms all bid frantically, just to get their hands on it.

I saw that a supreme extradimensional realm began to bid wildly, and after a while, the bidding price soared to 100 billion Galanbao coins.

According to this auction situation, it must at least be raised to hundreds of billions of garanbao coins.

Even Ye Tian felt that this price was too terrifying, and he was far from qualified to bid.

"It seems that we can only wait for our cultivation to break through to the extradimensional realm in the future, so that we can hope to accumulate so many Galan Treasure Coins!"

Ye Tian said so secretly.

After bidding again and again, in the end, an extradimensional realm auctioned off this treasure at a terrifying high price of 360 billion Galanbao coins.

Seeing that this extra-dimensional Xuantian Dao fruit was auctioned off at 20, many extra-dimensional realms secretly felt sorry for themselves, but they didn't have more Gala Treasure Coins, or they felt that it was not worth it, and they were reluctant to have more Gala Treasure Coins.

Soon, the second finale item was presented.

As soon as the Dove Star Realm God finished speaking, a group of half-step transcendent realms were shocked, revealing blood-devouring eager eyes.

If it weren't for their lack of strength, otherwise they would really dare to snatch this Reverse Blood Super Dimensional Vine on the spot!

After all, for those of them who had transformed their physical bodies at the peak of the Realm God Realm, this was their only chance to break through to the Transcendent Realm!

They had never seen such a treasure before, but now they had seen it.

But as the Dove Star Realm God announced the starting price, they despaired one by one.

"Reverse Blood Super Dimensional Vine, the starting price is 60 billion Gala Treasure Coins!"

The dove star god said.

The starting price of this thing is more than the super-dimensional Xuantian Dao Fruit, which is also very normal, after all, the super-dimensional Xuantian Dao Fruit is used by the peak realm god, and the peak realm god uses it, and comprehends the power of the super-dimensional, but it only breaks through to the half-step super-dimensional realm, and it will take a long time to be able to advance to the super-dimensional realm step by step.

However, the Reverse Blood Extradimensional Vine is different, it can completely give those half-step extradimensional realms that are one step away from the extra-dimensional realm, and these half-step extra-dimensional realms are just those who have transformed their physical bodies, resulting in the loss of the opportunity to break through.

If they use the Reverse Blood Extradimensional Vine, they can directly impact the Extradimensional Realm!

Therefore, the Reverse Blood Super Dimensional Vine is completely equivalent to recreating a Super Dimensional Realm, how noble its value is, it is naturally more precious than the Super Dimensional Xuantian Dao Fruit!

However, the half-step extradimensional realms present were still not eligible to bid, and it was still these extradimensional realms who participated in the auction.

Really.

These extra-dimensional realms continued to bid, and in a short time, the bidding price surpassed the 360 billion Gala Blue Treasure Coin of the Superdimensional Xuantian Dao Fruit.

In the end, an extradimensional realm won the auction at a high price of 460 billion Gala Treasure Coins.

This price is also reasonable, after all, as long as you find a suitable half-step extradimensional realm, you don't need time accumulation, and you can cultivate a superdimensional realm in a short time!

Isn't an extradimensional realm worth 460 billion garnabol coins?

Of course.

In fact, the Garan Chamber of Commerce does not want to auction such a treasure, but if a strong person contributes this treasure, the Garan Chamber of Commerce will not refuse.

With the Reverse Blood Ultra Vine being auctioned, only one last auction item remained.

At this time, many half-step extradimensional realms were curious about what the last finale item was.

After all, the first two finale items are precious, and the last finale item will only be more precious. []

Wow!

An extradimensional realm suddenly appeared, bringing with him a third finale item.

"It's the superdimensional realm powerhouse of the Garan Chamber of Commerce, the Ice Phoenix Realm Master!"

The Ice Phoenix Realm Lord took out the third finale item and said, "Everyone, the third finale item is too precious, and I will personally auction it." "

"The third finale item is a fragment of a mysterious thing, and I don't know its origin, but this fragment helps to comprehend the extradimensional rules, and as for whether or not you can comprehend the extradimensional rules, it depends on creation. "

"What, a treasure that can assist in comprehending the rules of the extradimensional !!!"

The extra-dimensional realms were excited, and even a trace of breath was leaked because of the excitement.

This trace of aura made it difficult for many half-step extradimensional realms to move, and Hun 403's body felt cold, and his consciousness seemed to be frozen.

But these extradimensional realm powerhouses quickly restrained their breath and became calm.

"Extradimensional Rule !!"

Ye Tian was also extremely surprised.

He knows the existence of extradimensional rules, and after comprehending the superdimensional power, he needs to open up the superdimensional heart domain and constantly refine the superdimensional power, and after the superdimensional power has passed through the realm of small success, great success, and consummation, he has reached the limit of the superdimensional power.

At this time, it is necessary to comprehend the rules of extradimensionality.

The extra-dimensional realm that has not comprehended the extra-dimensional rules can only be regarded as an ordinary extra-dimensional realm, there are many such extra-dimensional realms, and they are very ordinary, and many extra-dimensional forces in the 6000 territory have such ordinary extra-dimensional realms.

But the extra-dimensional realm that comprehends the extra-dimensional rules is different, and the strength is far beyond the ordinary extra-dimensional realm.

Like the Tianyang family, only one of them has comprehended the rules of the super-dimensional, and it is this super-dimensional realm powerhouse who has caused the incident.

Therefore, the Tianyang family wanted to let this old ancestor survive, otherwise without the suppression of this old ancestor, just relying on those ordinary extradimensional realms would not be able to deter the enemies of the Tianyang family at all.

"I'm still far away from comprehending the rules of the extradimensional!"

Ye Tian shook his head secretly, he didn't have the idea of competing for this fragment, and he couldn't afford to bid for it!.
